sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33684" key="e(ligmatw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑλιγ-μᾰτώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἑλικοειδής</foreign>, <sense id="n33684.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">twisted, Lex. de Spir.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg004.perseus-grc1:p.195" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.195</biblScope> </bibl> V.</sense> </entryFree>
